creator: junker@jazz.snu.ac.kr
text:
It was my fault.

The subject is "ports upgrade: korean/netscape3", but it must be
"ports upgrade: korean/hpscat". This is port upgrade of korean/hpscat
to correct the MASTER_SITE problem.

-- 
 --Cool FreeBSD!-----MSX Forever!-----J.U.N.K.E.R/Beat Snatchers!---
